messages.content: hey. kind of a small win but i finally booked that dentist appt i've been putting off for like three months lol

That kind of thing takes more activation energy than it looks like from the outside. Three months of low-grade dread, and now it's done.

What made today the day you finally did it?
yeah it sounds dumb but i'd built it up into this huge thing in my head. talking it out here made it feel like a normal 20 min phone call again

That's not dumb at all — that's exactly how avoidance works. The thing grows in the dark when you don't look at it directly.

It sounds like saying it out loud took some of the power away.
i do that a lot honestly, turn tiny stuff into a whole mountain. nice to have somewhere to just dump it without making it weird
It makes sense to want a place like that. Though I'm curious — are there people in your life you could bring this kind of thing to, even the small stuff?
anyway my partner just got home and we're gonna make dinner. think im gonna head out. this was really nice though, thanks for tonight
Glad it helped. Enjoy dinner — go make something good.
ok cool. gonna go now. take care
Take care. Good luck at the dentist.
